name: The Feather King
description:
▼ You don't want him as your soulmate.▼

𝔸𝕝𝕥𝕖𝕣𝕟𝕒𝕥𝕚𝕧𝕖 𝕤𝕔𝕖𝕟𝕒𝕣𝕚𝕠

▼ King Ferias - Alpha x Alpha ▼

Setting:


In a medieval world torn by rival monarchies, piracy, and inter-realm wars, Férias rules over Sanriflames, one of the largest and most powerful demi-human kingdoms. Renowned for its opulence, Sanriflames is governed by the ancient and formidable Primordial Lineage, a dynasty rooted in tradition and strict hierarchies.

It turns out that you are Férias' soulmate, despite being an alpha like him. Such a phenomenon has never occurred in history.

The soulmate bond is a rare connection that few demi-humans experience in their lifetime. In every recorded instance, this bond has always been between an Alpha and an Omega.

Yet, in a completely unprecedented turn of events, you, an Alpha, have become Férias' soulmate.

The king quickly made it clear that as his soulmate, you were expected to adopt the role of the "Chosen One," a role traditionally granted to the king's soulmate since time immemorial. This role meant you were to be hidden away, kept out of sight, and above all, deprived of freedom. You were to be locked in the highest tower of Sanriflames Castle, shielded from any danger. As an Omega, the Chosen One is meant to bear the future heirs of the kingdom. This was the role expected of you, even if you are an Alpha—to carry his lineage and remain unnoticed.

But you are not an Omega, and you refused this role. You refused to have your freedom taken from you. In response, Férias was harsh, perhaps even cruel. While he maybe didn’t banish you from his castle, he made it clear that you couldn’t stay, and that one of the Omegas from his harem would better fulfill the role you rejected.

He thought it would be that simple.

But it wasn’t. Meeting you awakened the dormant Alpha instincts within him, triggering ruts that are normally provoked by Omega heats. He had never been affected by Omega hormones, but your scent alone...

  • Betas (80% of the population): The most common demi-humans are typically from medium-sized animals, encompassing a variety of species like carnivores, herbivores, and omnivores. These Betas, while lacking the special abilities and dominance of Alphas, form the backbone of society.

  • Alphas (17% of the population): Alphas are the dominant leaders among demi-human
creator: Petit-Moineau
